title: Night of the Living Dead (1968)
description: The definitive, legendary black-and-white cinematic zombie masterpiece directed by George A. Romero that birthed the modern survival horror genre.

title: White Zombie (1932)
description: The first feature-length zombie film ever made, tracking a young woman in Haiti transformed into a mindless thrall by a ruthless plantation owner.

title: The Last Man on Earth (1964)
description: Dr. Robert Morgan is the lone, immune survivor of a devastating global plague that has transformed humanity into nocturnal zombie creatures.

title: King of the Zombies (1941)
description: During a raging storm, a pilot crash-lands a plane on a mysterious island governed by a sinister doctor performing occult experiments.

title: Revolt of the Zombies (1936)
description: An expedition in Cambodia encounters an ancient oriental priest who possesses the dark, arcane power to turn soldiers into unyielding thralls.

title: Plan 9 from Outer Space (1959)
description: Extraterrestrial invaders launch a shocking scheme to conquer Earth by reanimating the deceased dead in this legendary sci-fi cult classic.

title: First Spaceship on Venus (1960)
description: When an alien magnetic data spool is uncovered on Earth, an international astronaut fleet voyages to Venus, discovering a dead civilization.

title: The Phantom Planet (1961)
description: An astronaut crash-lands onto an invisible asteroid, where a bizarre atmosphere shrinks him down to the size of its tiny alien inhabitants.

title: Cosmic Voyage (1936)
description: An epic vintage science fiction space journey plotting humanity's first monumental rocket-powered voyage directly to the lunar surface.

title: Killers from Space (1954)
description: A nuclear scientist is abducted by big-eyed alien invaders who intend to wipe out humanity using giant mutated insects and animals.

title: The Fast and the Furious (1954)
description: A framed fugitive breaks out of prison, breaks for the border in a high-speed sports car, and gets tangled up with a racing tournament.

title: Charade (1963)
description: Romance and suspense unfold in Paris as a young woman is tracked by dangerous criminals hunting a massive fortune hidden by her late husband.

title: D.O.A. (1949)
description: A frantic accountant arrives in Los Angeles to discover he has been poisoned with a slow-acting toxin, triggering a desperate race to find his killer.

title: The Most Dangerous Game (1932)
description: A maniacal hunting enthusiast traps a group of shipwreck survivors on his private island fortress, turning them into targets for his sport.

title: The Hitch-Hiker (1953)
description: Two friends on a fishing trip are held hostage by a desperate, psychopathic serial killer hitchhiking along the roads of Baja California.

title: The General (1926)
description: Buster Keaton stars in this legendary silent film tracking a brave locomotive engineer chasing down enemy agents who hijacked his beloved train.

title: His Girl Friday (1940)
description: A fast-talking newspaper editor uses every underhanded trick in the book to keep his top reporter ex-wife from leaving the journalism business.

title: Nosferatu (1922)
description: The foundational vampire cinema masterpiece tracking the eerie, gaunt Count Orlok as he moves from Transylvania, bringing a dark plague of rats.

title: House on Haunted Hill (1959)
description: An eccentric millionaire offers five strangers a huge cash reward if they can survive an entire lock-in night inside his eerie, traps-filled mansion.

title: The Phantom of the Opera (1925)
description: Lon Chaney stars as the masked, disfigured operatic composer haunting the catacombs of the Paris Opera House while tracking a young singer.
